meta.goal: Modernize the dangerous goods site inspection risk scoring model to improve detection rates, reduce false negatives, and maintain budget neutrality through the STRL-2026 streamlining filter.
meta.description: Cross-functional team responsible for the 2026-27 modernization of the National Occupational Profile (NOP) risk model used to prioritize dangerous goods site inspections across Canada. The team rebuilt the model from a failing 2015 baseline (14% false negative rate) to a fully compliant, audited production system.

meta.goal: Own TDG_CORE database integrity, SAS model implementation, and all data governance for the risk model.
meta.description: Responsible for data quality, model coding, and technical validation. This sub-team identified and remediated the 1900-01-01 legacy data decay issue affecting 11,240 records, produced the production SAS model, and ran UAT parallel validation before go-live.
